ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team or organization the player represents */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player */,
  "handicap" INTEGER /* Handicap of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_streaks" (
  "streak_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each streak record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who achieved the streak */,
  "week_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player this week based on their performance */,
  "previous_week_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player from the previous week */,
  "number_of_rounds" INTEGER /* Total number of rounds played during the streak */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the streak was recorded */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the streak */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the streak */,
  "total_score" INTEGER /* Total score accumulated during the streak */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("streak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_streaks_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team or organization */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the team is based */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division or category of the team */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Link to the team's official website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Links to the team's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who played the round */,
  "date_played" TEXT /* Date the round was played */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the player in the round */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the golf course where the round was played */,
  "tee_time" TEXT /* Tee time for the round */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the round */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number in a tournament */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament where the round was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each golf course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the golf course */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the golf course */,
  "par" INTEGER /* Par value of the golf course */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the course in yards */,
  "difficulty_rating" INTEGER /* Difficulty rating of the course */,
  "website" TEXT /* Link to the course's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year corresponding to the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "tournament_count" INTEGER /* Number of tournaments in the season */,
  "total_players" INTEGER /* Total number of players who participated in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player for whom analytics are calculated */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score achieved by the player during the season */,
  "best_score" INTEGER /* Best score achieved by the player in a single round */,
  "worst_score" INTEGER /* Worst score achieved by the player in a single round */,
  "total_rounds_played" INTEGER /* Total number of rounds played by the player in the season */,
  "streak_count" INTEGER /* Number of streaks the player achieved */,
  "longest_streak" INTEGER /* Longest streak of achieving par or better */,
  "consistency_score" REAL /* Score indicating the player's consistency over the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Team or organization the coach is associated with */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the coach */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the coach joined the system */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the coach based on player feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose data is being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
